name: Level History Revived
description: Look and play through deleted and outdated levels using GDHistory! Revived and updated fork.

instance-url.name: Instance URL
instance-url.description: Base URL of the <cp>GDHistory</c> instance used by default. Can still be overridden at runtime from the provider settings page.

request-timeout.name: Request timeout
request-timeout.description: Maximum time (in <cy>seconds</c>) to wait for the GDHistory server before giving up.

cache-ttl.name: Cache lifetime
cache-ttl.description: How long (in <cy>seconds</c>) API responses are kept in the session cache. Lower values give fresher data, higher values reduce server load. <cr>0 disables caching.</c>

show-date-estimation.name: Show estimated upload date
show-date-estimation.description: After searching a level by ID, fetch and display GDHistory's <cg>estimated original upload date</c> for that level ID.
